ip_outcome_note: Card name on frame is 'Wild Tiger, the Imposing' — the card itself names the character. Wild Tiger (Japanese: Mo Kekko) is a canon DBZ character who competed in the 27th and 28th World Martial Arts Tournaments. Verified via Dragon Ball Wiki Fandom. Note: canon Wild Tiger has a braided ponytail per the wiki, making the bald depiction in the art potentially a visual simplification or alternate tournament appearance in the card art. The card name constitutes sufficient evidence of identity per triviabot rules.

trivia_bullets.text: Wild Tiger (Japanese name: Mo Kekko, lit. 'Ferocious Bloody Tiger') is a minor tournament fighter who appeared in Dragon Ball Z, competing in both the 27th World Martial Arts Tournament (where he reached the semi-finals before losing to Majin Buu) and the 28th (where he was quickly defeated by Pan). He is one of several background tournament fighters the TB2 set elevated to card status. [Dragon Ball Wiki via WebSearch snippet]
sources: WebSearch: Dragon Ball Wiki Fandom - Wild Tiger

trivia_bullets.text: The World Martial Arts Tournament Themed Booster (DBS-TB02) is a 125-card set released by Bandai that draws exclusively from the 28th World Martial Arts Tournament arc of Dragon Ball Z, featuring both major fighters (Goku, Trunks, Uub) and minor recurring tournament participants like Wild Tiger. Each booster pack contains 12 cards. [WebSearch: dbs-cardgame.com/asia/product/dbs-tb02 / DBZ Exchange]

TB2-031 is a Common rarity battle card priced at $0.10 market value, reflecting its status as a background-character common in a set dominated by Goku, Trunks, and Uub pull value. In the TB02 set, commons serve as combo fodder rather than win conditions. [WebSearch: TrollAndToad TB2-031 listing / PriceCharting World Martial Arts Tournament]
sources: WebSearch: PriceCharting World Martial Arts Tournament
